articles.title: UK Manufacturing Momentum Eases as S&P Global PMI Slips to 51.7 in February
articles.expand: The United Kingdom’s manufacturing sector saw a slight loss of momentum in February, with the S P Global Manufacturing PMI edging down to 51.7, compared with 52.0 previously. Both readings are for February 2026, with the updated data released on 2 March 2026. Despite the marginal decline, the index remains above the 50.0 threshold that separates ex...
articles.ai_headline: PMI manufacturero Reino Unido cae a 51.7 en febrero: presión bajista sobre GBP

articles.title: UK M4 Money Supply Slips into Negative Territory in January, Signalling Cooling Liquidity Conditions
articles.expand: The United Kingdom’s broad money supply, measured by M4, contracted in January 2026, pointing to a softening in liquidity conditions at the start of the year. According to the latest data updated on 2 March 2026, M4 money supply fell by 0.1% month-over-month, down from a 0.4% increase recorded in December 2025. On a month-over-month comparison basi...
articles.ai_headline: Oferta monetaria M4 del Reino Unido cae 0.1% en enero: señal de liquidez en descenso, presión bajista sobre GBP

articles.title: Poland Q4 GDP Growth Confirmed at Over 3-Year High
articles.expand: The Polish economy grew by 4% year-on-year in the final quarter of 2025, confirming preliminary estimates and picking up from a 3.8% expansion in the previous quarter. This was the fastest pace of growth since the third quarter of 2022, supported by stronger household consumption (2.1% vs. 2% in Q3) and higher government spending (1.7% vs. 1.5%). G...
articles.ai_headline: Crecimiento del PIB de Polonia en el 4to trimestre confirmado en 4% interanual: impacto neutro en USD

articles.title: Italy GDP Expands 0.5% in 2025
articles.expand: Italy’s GDP grew by 0.5% in real terms in 2025, easing from an upwardly revised 0.8% increase in the previous year and matching earlier preliminary estimates, according to Istat. This marked the weakest expansion since the Covid-induced recession in 2020 and fell short of the Bank of Italy’s most recent forecast of 0.6% growth. The increase in outp...
articles.ai_headline: PIB Italia sube 0.5% en 2025 por debajo del pronóstico del Banco de Italia: presión bajista sobre EUR

articles.title: Peru Inflation Rate at 15-Month High
articles.expand: The annual inflation rate in Peru’s capital, Lima, rose to 2.21% in February 2026, up from 1.70% in January. This was the highest level since November 2024, yet it remained within the central bank’s target range of 1% to 3%. Price increases were recorded in food and non-alcoholic beverages (3.99% vs. 2.13% in January), alcoholic beverages and tobac...
articles.ai_headline: Inflación en Perú sube a 2.21% en febrero: dentro del rango objetivo del banco central, impacto neutro en USD

articles.title: Poland’s Q4 GDP Growth Edges Up to 4.0% Year-on-Year, Topping Previous Quarter’s Pace
articles.expand: Poland’s economy expanded by 4.0% year-on-year in the fourth quarter of 2025, a slight acceleration from the previously recorded 3.8% in the same period. The updated figures, released on 2 March 2026, indicate that the country managed to strengthen its growth momentum toward the end of 2025. Both the current and previous readings are based on year-...
articles.ai_headline: Crecimiento del PIB de Polonia sube a 4.0% interanual en el cuarto trimestre: impacto neutro en NZD

articles.title: Czech M3 Money Supply Growth Accelerates to 5.3% in January 2026
articles.expand: The Czech Republic’s broad money supply, measured by the M3 aggregate, accelerated in January 2026, signaling a moderate strengthening in monetary conditions. According to the latest data updated on 2 March 2026, M3 grew by 5.3% year-on-year, up from 4.6% in December 2025. The pickup in M3 suggests an expansion in liquidity within the Czech financi...
articles.ai_headline: Crecimiento de oferta monetaria M3 en República Checa acelera a 5.3% en enero 2026: neutro para USD

articles.title: Poland’s GDP Growth Inches Up to 1.0% in Q4, Extending Fragile Recovery
articles.expand: Poland’s economy showed a modest improvement at the end of 2025, with quarter-on-quarter GDP growth edging up to 1.0% in the fourth quarter, compared with a 0.9% increase previously. The latest figures, updated on 2 March 2026, indicate a slight strengthening in momentum, as the expansion in the final quarter of 2025 outpaced the growth recorded in...
articles.ai_headline: Crecimiento del PIB de Polonia sube a 1.0% en Q4: impacto neutro en USD

articles.title: Italy’s 10-Year BTP Yield Rises From 1-Year Low
articles.expand: Italy’s 10-year BTP yield rose above 3.3%, rebounding from Friday’s one-year low of 3.276%, as mounting tensions in the Middle East rattled global markets and led investors to scale back expectations for interest rate cuts by major central banks amid renewed inflation concerns. articles.title: Swiss Factory Contraction Intensifies in February
articles.expand: Switzerland’s procure.ch and UBS Manufacturing PMI fell to 47.4 in February 2026 from 48.8 in January, undershooting market expectations of 50.1. This extends a three-year run below the 50-point mark, signaling continued contraction in the manufacturing sector. Production retreated by 3 points to 47, after having climbed to 50.8 in January. articles.title: Germany’s 10-Year Bund Yield Rises on Inflation Fears
articles.expand: Germany’s 10-year Bund yield rose to 2.66% at the start of March, rebounding from a four-month low, as escalating tensions in the Middle East unsettled global markets and led investors to scale back expectations for interest rate cuts by major central banks amid renewed inflation worries. articles.title: BoJ: Ryozo Himino dice que podría subir los tipos hacia lo neutral si la inflación subyacente se acelera hacia el objetivo
articles.expand: El vicegobernador del Banco de Japón (BoJ), Ryozo Himino, dijo el lunes que incluso si la inflación general cae por debajo del 2%, el banco central podría aumentar las tasas de interés hacia un nivel neutral si considera que la inflación subyacente está acelerándose hacia nuestro objetivo de precios
articles.ai_headline: BoJ podría subir tasas hacia lo neutral si inflación subyacente se acelera: presión alcista sobre JPY

articles.title: BoJ’s Himino says could raise rates toward neutral if underlying inflation accelerates to target
articles.expand: Bank of Japan (BoJ) Deputy Governor Himino said on Monday that even if headline inflation falls below 2%, the central bank could raise interest rates toward neutral if it judge underlying inflation is accelerating to our price target.
articles.ai_headline: BoJ podría subir tasas hacia neutrales si inflación subyacente acelera hacia objetivo: presión alcista sobre JPY

articles.expand: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) US Crude Oil prices trim a part of strong intraday gains to levels beyond the $73.00 mark, or the highest since June 2025, touched this Monday in reaction to a dramatic escalation of geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.

articles.expand: Switzerland’s economy returned to modest growth in Q1, with GDP expanding 0.1% qoq. While slightly below expectations of 0.2%, the reading marks a rebound from the -0.4% contraction recorded in Q3. According to the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs, performance varied across sectors, with domestic demand providing the main source of support. T...
